title: Pipeline Escalation
description: Escalation artifact written when a pipeline stage encounters a blocking condition that requires human operator intervention. Variants are discriminated by halt_reason: 'unverified_fields' (requires resolved_fields + unresolved_fields), 'cache_hit_rate_unavailable' (requires signal + evolve_block_references), and prerequisite halt reasons ('missing_algorithm_summary', 'out_of_scope_patterns', 'missing_mapping_artifact', 'evolve_block_hash_mismatch') which require only the base fields (stage, halt_reason, details). The validator does not support oneOf; variant constraints are documented here and enforced by the pipeline orchestrator.

stage.description: Pipeline stage number that produced the escalation.

halt_reason.description: Discriminator for the escalation variant. When 'unverified_fields': resolved_fields and unresolved_fields are required. When 'cache_hit_rate_unavailable': signal and evolve_block_references are required. Prerequisite halt reasons ('missing_algorithm_summary', 'out_of_scope_patterns', 'missing_mapping_artifact', 'evolve_block_hash_mismatch') require only the base fields (stage, halt_reason, details). Stage 2 halt reasons: 'stale_submodule_commit', 'unmappable_signal', 'coverage_incomplete', 'unknown_signal_unresolved', 'pre_write_validation_failure'. Stage 3 halt reasons: 'missing_signal_coverage' (signal_coverage.json absent), 'stale_signal_coverage' (commit_hash mismatch), 'unverified_field_threshold_not_met' (UNVERIFIED field resolution below threshold), 'cache_hit_rate_unavailable_stage3' (CacheHitRate unavailable and used as multiplier), 'post_write_validation_failure_stage3', 'pre_write_validation_failure_stage3', 'evolve_block_hash_mismatch_stage3'. Stage 4 halt reasons: 'build_compilation_failure' (go build failed after 3 retries), 'test_failure_limit_exceeded' (go test failed after 3 retries), 'total_retry_limit_exceeded' (5 total retries across all classes), 'identical_consecutive_errors' (same error in consecutive retries), 'oscillating_errors' (same error signature 3 times across retries), 'infrastructure_error_stage4' (module/timeout/environment errors), 'missing_stage3_output' (stage3_output.json absent), 'stage3_schema_validation_failed' (stage3_output.json present but fails schema validation), 'scorer_file_missing' (generated scorer file not on disk), 'test_file_missing' (generated test file not on disk), 'register_file_missing' (generated register file not on disk).

details.description: Human-readable description of the blocking condition.

resolved_fields.description: Variant: unverified_fields. Metric field names that were successfully confirmed or mapped to alternatives.

unresolved_fields.description: Variant: unverified_fields. Metric field names that could not be confirmed or mapped.

signal.description: Variant: cache_hit_rate_unavailable. The signal that triggered the escalation (expected value: 'CacheHitRate').

evolve_block_references.description: Variant: cache_hit_rate_unavailable. References to where CacheHitRate is used in the EVOLVE-BLOCK scoring logic (e.g., penalty terms, composite signals).
